title: Wax Melts - Mixed Favourites | 16 Pack | Strong Scented | Made in the UK | Plastic Free | Vegan
features: MIXED FAVOURITES WAX MELTS - find your favourite fragrance! This box, specially packed with internal dividers, includes 2 wax melts of your favourite scents: Fresh Linen, Sweet Pea, Snow Queen, Lemongrass and Ginger, Lime Basil and Mandarin, Lavender and Chamomile, Rhubarb and Rose and Baby Powder. Enjoy trying our favourite scents so you can find your favourites too!

LONG LASTING 16 PACK AND UP TO 96 HOURS OF FRAGRANCE - each 6.5g wax melts packs a real punch with up to 6 hours of scent per melt. Prefer a weaker scent just use 1/2 or use 2 melts for a stronger longer lasting fragrance. Suitable for tealight wax burners and electric wax warmers (ideally 40watts).
PLASTIC FREE AND COMPOSTABLE PACKAGING - we hate plastic so all packaging used is FSC certified and we even use compostable inner lining sheets to be totally eco friendly.
VEGAN AND VEGETARIAN FRIENDLY - we only use the highest quality cruelty free soy wax and paraben free fragrances for a superior clean burn and excellent scent throw.

MADE IN BRITAIN - all our wax melts are made here in Manchester by hand in our small family run business. Our suppliers are all in the UK too and pride themselves on manufacturing the highest quality materials.
description: Product description How To Use - Take a heart wax melt and place it in your wax melter. Either light a 4 hour tea light or switch on your electric burner. Enjoy the fragrance filling your home as the wax gently melts. Each melt will last up to 6 hours and sometimes longer depending on the individual fragrance and the type of burner you are using (burners and tea lights can produce different results). Once the scent is no longer noticeable remove the wax and dispose of it carefully in your general waste bin. Safety Warning [GENERAL_SAFETY_WARNINGS]
